scope: Core references controlling the flagship novelty, methods, and source-conditioned claims
rules: DOI, title, author order, journal or source, year, volume, and pages or article number must be verified where applicable.
Repository inferences must not be attributed to the source paper.
A verified citation does not authorize redistribution of restricted full text.
The generated bibliography must preserve Unicode author names and chemical formulas.
